query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bets b JOIN games g ON b.gameId = g.id WHERE g.tournamentId = 30001) as bets_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pools WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as pools_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as games_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teams WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as teams_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bets b JOIN games g ON b.gameId = g.id WHERE g.tournamentId = 30001) as bets_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pools WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as pools_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as games_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teams WHERE tournamentId = 30001) as teams_count;
